mapper.sql: id, created_time, updated_time, is_delete, credential_id, account_id, credential_type, password_hash, hash_algorithm
mapper.select: select from auth_credentials where id = #{id} and is_delete = 0 limit 1
select from auth_credentials where credential_id = #{credentialId} and is_delete = 0 limit 1

select from auth_credentials
order by id desc

select from auth_credentials
order by id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.insert: insert into auth_credentials (created_time, updated_time, is_delete, credential_id, account_id, credential_type, password_hash, hash_algorithm) values (#{createdTime}, #{updatedTime}, #{isDelete}, #{credentialId}, #{accountId}, #{credentialType}, #{passwordHash}, #{hashAlgorithm})

insert into auth_credentials (created_time, updated_time, is_delete, credential_id, account_id, credential_type, password_hash, hash_algorithm) values
(#{item.createdTime}, #{item.updatedTime}, #{item.isDelete}, #{item.credentialId}, #{item.accountId}, #{item.credentialType}, #{item.passwordHash}, #{item.hashAlgorithm})
mapper.update: update auth_credentials set account_id = #{accountId}, credential_type = #{credentialType}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, hash_algorithm = #{hashAlgorithm}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, is_delete = #{isDelete} where id = #{id}

update auth_credentials set account_id = #{accountId}, credential_type = #{credentialType}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, hash_algorithm = #{hashAlgorithm}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, is_delete = #{isDelete} where credential_id = #{credentialId}

update.foreach: update auth_credentials set account_id = #{item.accountId}, credential_type = #{item.credentialType}, password_hash = #{item.passwordHash}, hash_algorithm = #{item.hashAlgorithm}, updated_time = #{item.updatedTime}, is_delete = #{item.isDelete} where credential_id = #{item.credentialId}
